summary_en: FY3/27 annual dividend raised to 65 yen/share: 64 yen ordinary dividend (up 2 yen from 62 yen in FY3/26) plus 1 yen 60th-anniversary commemorative dividend. Interim dividend 32 yen (unchanged); year-end dividend 33 yen (ordinary 32 yen + 1 yen commemorative).
title_en: Notice on FY3/27 Dividend Forecast (60th Anniversary Commemorative Dividend)
translation_en_brief: HYOJITO Co., Ltd. announced its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2027. The company will pay an annual dividend of 65 yen per share, comprising an ordinary dividend of 64 yen and a 1-yen 60th-anniversary commemorative dividend. The interim dividend is set at 32 yen (ordinary component, unchanged from the prior year), and the year-end dividend is 33 yen (32 yen ordinary plus 1 yen commemorative). This represents a 2-yen increase in ordinary dividend from the 62 yen annual ordinary dividend paid in FY3/26. The company attributed the increase to strengthened shareholder returns while maintaining balance with reinvestment in business operations and internal reserves. The 60th-anniversary commemorative dividend reflects the company's gratitude to shareholders, customers, and business partners for their support since its founding.
